characters.name: Andy
characters.description: AndyGeneral informationSpecies:WatchdogGender:MaleProfessional InformationAffiliations:Hater EmpireBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:The Eye on the SkullshipVoiced by:Andy Daly[1] Andyis aWatchdogwho has his own video blog. He also made the new series "Eye on the Skullship", which is about what's going on in the skull ship. WhileLord HaterandCommander Peepersdidn't like his video blog, theWatchdogson the other hand thought it made them feel special. His looks are identical to the rest of the Watchdogs.

characters.name: Angela
characters.description: Angelais a guest character fromWander Over Yonder,and she was voiced byND Stevenson, one of writers off this show.She appeared inThe LegendasMelodie's younger sister and the youngest of the kids. She is also the only kid who didn't have any dialogue besides a gasp and a scream. She carries around a plushie that seems to be inspired bySylvia's physical appearance.

characters.name: Badlands Dan
characters.description: Badlands DanGeneral informationSpecies:Unidentified bull-like alien speciesGender:MaleFriends and FamilyFriends:WanderSylviaEnemies:Wander(formerly)Sylvia(formerly)Lord HaterLord DominatorBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Bad Guy"Voiced by:Clancy Brown Badlands Danis a inhabitant ofDoomstone, a planet inhabited by bad guys. WanderandSylviawind up on planet Doomstone due to shortage of orbbal juice. Sylvia and Wander try to act tough so they can get into the saloon and get some juice. Wander sits in a a bar stool, that was apparently Badlands Dan's. Badlands Dan got angry and ripped a warrant off the wall saying he's a wanted man. Wander ripped of a patch of Badland's chest fur and drew himself a warrant saying he's meaner and more wanted than he is. He challenges Wander to a fight outside. Wander steals a motorcycle from the motorhogs, which him and Sylvia take off on. Sylvia and Wander get to Papa Doom's palace and they believe he's tough and Papa Doom orders them some orbble juice. Wander gave them rocks instead of crystals and they chased after them, meeting up with the bad guys once again. Wander takes his mustache off and Sylvia admits they're not mean and need to return home. The enemies get mad and all admit they all fake being tough. Badlands Dan was the first to admit and then said he misses his garden. They renamed the planet as Congenial Rock. Papa Doom gave Wander and Sylvia their juice. Badlands Dan wished that they would come again and Wander patted him on the snout bone. Badlands Dan laughed cutely and said it tickled.

characters.description: Balloon GuyGeneral informationSpecies:Balloon guyGender:MaleFriends and FamilyFriends:WanderEnemies:Lord HaterLord DominatorBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Fugitives"Voiced by:Tom Kenny Balloon Guyis a minor character in theWander Over Yonderepisode "The Fugitives". He is voiced byTom Kenny. He is a blue balloon man with a large hat, bow tie, and distinctive features such as his large nose and slight transparency.

characters.name: Barry
characters.description: BarryGeneral informationSpecies:WatchdogGender:MaleAge:30Professional InformationAffiliations:Hater armyFriends and FamilyBossLord HaterCommanderCommander PeepersBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Rider"Voiced by:Keith FergusonBarryis a Watchdog first named in the episode "The Rider". It was his birthday, turning 30, and was hoping somebody would remember it.Wandergave him a cake, and the Watchdogs realized that it was his birthday, so they stopped the chase to they would celebrate it with him. He looks identical to the other Watchdogs.

characters.name: Beefeaters
characters.description: BeefeatersGeneral informationGender:MaleOccupation:Sourdough's servantsProfessional InformationAffiliations:Sourdough the Evil Sandwich(ruler)Queen Entozoa(formerly)Friends and FamilyEnemies:WanderSylviaLord HaterCommander PeepersEmperor AwesomeKremlonsKragthar of KraaaaagtttthhLord DominatorBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Fancy Party"Last Appearance:"The Battle Royale"Voiced by:NoneThe "Beefeaters" were originally the personal guards and servants ofQueen Entozoa, but after her "demise", they became the minions ofSourdough the Evil Sandwichwho was in fact a being who had been possessing Entozoa for the last 1,000 years, thus making it the Beefeaters' official boss. The Beefeaters are imposing, muscular humanoids with crystal or metal balls that act as both heads and eyes (similar to theWatchdogs), and wear Baroque-style uniforms and powdered wigs. The Beefeaters are a capable army of efficient soldiers with great strength and combat capabilities. In combat they either fight with their strong fists or scepters that can shoot out lasers. They are also skilled pilots and can operate Sourdough's space fleet.

characters.name: Beep Boop
characters.description: "'I... am... beep boop.'"— Beep Boop's last words. Beep BoopimageBGA45209SpeciesDombotGenderMaleOther namesBot 13 (formerly)Beep BoopResidenceLord Dominator's shipOccupationDominator Bot (formerly)EyesRedRelativesLord Dominator (creator)FriendsLord Dominator (formerly)WanderEnemiesWander (formerly)ownerLord Dominator (formerly)First seen"The Bot"Last seen"The Bot"Voiced byKeith Ferguson Beep Boop At the beginning of "The Bot", he is evil and obedient like the rest of theDominator-Bots. But when he metWander, he began to become a better robot. By the end of the episode, he was a heroic, cheerful robot that sacrificed his life for the vacation planet he was on.

characters.name: Beeza
characters.description: BeezaGeneral informationSpecies:FleaGender:FemaleOccupation:Ruler of the flea colonyResidence:BusterBallzeria 9 (formerly)Other Ballzeria planets (before season 1)Friends and FamilyFriends:WanderSylviaEnemies:Buster(formerly)Physical InformationEyes:WhitewithblackscleraHair:Strong cyanwithvivid gambogeantannaeBody:Pale, light grayish aquamarinewithmoderate orangetattooOutfit:Robe:Whitewithlight purplish graylining andlight mulberrybeltLipstick:Light mulberryBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Ball"Voiced by:Tara StrongBeezais the leader of the species whose planets have been constantly destroyed byBuster, the giant dog. She is used to this by now and takes the destruction as if it's no big deal. She is a short bluish gray-skinned alien with dark turquoise hair and large black eyes with white pupils. On her forehead is a wheel-shaped ornament with what appears to be two feathery yellow antennas coming out of it. She wears a simple pink robe with a purple sash around her waist. Overall she resembles most female members of her species. Beeza is a friendly and calm character who is always polite and hospitable to others. Due to her home planet(s) having been destroyed so many times, she takes the destruction and chaos lightly. Having experienced apocalyptic scenarios so many times, she has become indifferent to the thought of mortal danger and does not seem to mind the idea of being captured, tortured or destroyed, as seen when Lord Hater threatened her in "The Rager". Because of this, she comes off as very easy-going. Beeza is a friendly and calm character who is always polite and hospitable to others. Due to her home planet(s) having been destroyed so many times, she takes the destruction and chaos lightly. Having experienced apocalyptic scenarios so many times, she has become indifferent to the thought of mortal danger and does not seem to mind the idea of being captured, tortured or destroyed, as seen when Lord Hater threatened her in "The Rager". Because of this, she comes off as very easy-going.

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: This is the page for the character. You may be looking forthe actor. "Sylvia, quiet that monkey down. I'm trying to watch this, uh, colors show."— Bill toSylviaaboutWanderwhile staring at a "No signal" message on the TV BillGeneral informationSpecies:ZbornakGender:MaleResidence:Zbornak PlanetProfessional InformationProfession:N/AAffiliations:WanderFriends and FamilyParents:Dorothy(mother)Sylvia's Father(father)Siblings:Sylvia(sister)PhilandGil(brothers)Grandparents:Gram(grandmother)Physical InformationEyes:Blackwithmoderate arctic blueeyelidsMane:Moderate vermilionBody:Moderate arctic blueModerate arctic blue2Dark cyanOutfit:Moderate redundershirt withlight spring budish graystripes above the shoulders as well aslight spring budish grayandopalish graybandages andblackarm warmersBehind the ScenesVoiced by:Rob RiggleBillis aZbornakwho appears in theSeason 2episode "The Family Reunion". He's the brother ofPhil,GilandSylvia, the show's deuteragonist, the son ofDorothyandSylvia's Father, and the grandson ofSylvia’s Grandmother. Like his brothers, Bill is feisty and easily aggravated. He can often be seen getting into arguments that escalate into physical fights (which are sometimes meant to be playful) with his brothers and occasionally his sister. However, despite this, he has a soft side, just like most, if not all of his other family members, seeing how he teared up at the end of the episode.

characters.name: Binglebops
characters.description: Binglebops TheBinglebopsare an alien species inWander Over Yonder, featured in the episode "The Greatest". In this episode,Lord Haterattempts to take over their planetBinglebopolopolisbut fails when Wander distracts him through a series of challenges. Their ruler isKing Bingleborp. They are a peaceful species that come in a variety of colors: purple, pink, light yellow, grey-blue, and orange. They seem to thrive on happiness and fun as the town they reside in is an amusement park and they engage in lots of festivities. They are also very affectionate and like to kiss and hug each other. They even make squeaky toy sounds. They celebrate festivities as "Bingleberry Festivals".

characters.name: Bird family
characters.description: A "Bird family" was caught during the eruption ofMt. Krackyourbigtoaduring "The Liar".WanderandSylviaspend most of the episode trying to get them out before it erupted. The chicks are completely white in color, with black eyes with a white dot in them, small beaks, light blue tails, with one having a light green tail instead, and purple feet. The mother has a more detailed design, she has a light blue body with the same black eyes of her children, but with two white spots. Her beak is longer and slightly more crooked, a salmon pink oval on the front of her face, white eyebrows that have the shape of thunder, purple feet and and triangle purple thing on top of her head.

characters.description: Blarnian Bridge TrollGeneral informationSpecies:Bridge TrollGender:MaleNationality:BlarnianBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Epic Quest of Unfathomable Difficulty!!!"Voiced by:None TheBlarnian Bridge Trollis a character from "The Epic Quest of Unfathomable Difficulty!!!". He is one of the obstacles forWanderandSylviaduring their journey to see the Guru. He's a big, dark blue-skinned troll with a skull on his hair that acts like a bow, black wristbands, and a door-like torso.

characters.description: BobGeneral informationSpecies:WatchdogGender:MaleOccupation:Lord Hater's minionFriends and FamilyFriends:Lord HaterCommander PeepersWatchdogsWestley(formerly)Moose(all allies)Enemies:WanderSylviaFist FightersEmperor AwesomePhysical InformationEyes:RedBody:PinkOutfit:BlackBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Brainstorm"Voiced by:Tom Kenny Bobis aWatchdogand part ofLord Hater'sarmy. characters.name: Bunny
characters.description: BunnyGeneral informationGender:MaleFriends and FamilyFriends:WanderBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Good Deed"Voiced by:NoneThebunnyis a character that appeared in the episode "The Good Deed".WanderandSylviain the beginning helped the bunny get something to eat. They grabbed a carrot from a branch and then gave it to him, unaware that they took it fromFleeblebort's branch. The bunny's general color scheme when he's in a good state is pinkish with a blue tongue. When hungry, he's ore or less the same, but with the colors slightly darker.

characters.name: Buster
characters.description: BusterGeneral informationAlias:Worldbuster (formerly)Species:DogGender:MaleFriends and FamilyEnemies:Beeza(formerly)the Ballzarians (formerly)Behind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Ball"Voiced by:Frank WelkerBuster(previously known asTheWorldbuster) is an enormous puppy. He mistookBallzeriafor a tennis ball and destroyed it nine times. In "The Ball,"WanderandSylviaralliedBeezaand the Ballzarians and attempted to thwart Buster from destroying Ballzeria 9. Ultimately, they were unsuccessful and forced to evacuate the planet. In a spur-of-the-moment decision, Wander drove the Ballzarian spaceship into Buster's fur, providing the Ballzarians with a new home on Buster. the Ballzarians (formerly)

characters.name: Captain Tim
characters.description: Captain TimGeneral informationSpecies:ArachnomorphFriends and FamilyFriends:Lord Hater(owner)Emily RipovEnemies:TimWanderPeepersWatchdogsSylviaBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Pet"Voiced by:Fred TatascioreCaptain Timis a spider-like alien thatWanderdiscovers on an abandoned spaceship and names. He is first seen in "The Pet", whenSylviaand Wander findan abandoned shipand search for people to help. In "The Search for Captain Tim", it is revealed that Captain Tim is an Arachnomorph, a race of highly aggressive aliens. He appears smaller than most members of his species. After Sylvia looks around and regroups with Wander, he finds a creature that coughs up a dog tag that reads "Captain Tim", so he named him according to this, which originally belonged tothe ship's captain. It is unknown how the alien arrived on the ship, but once aboard, it is strongly implied that he escaped and attackedthe crew. Nevertheless, Wander begins training him and treating him like a dog, despite the creature's aggressive behavior. Later on, he gives Captain Tim a stuffed animal and he rips it to shreds, covers it in acidic gel and sticks it to the ceiling. Wander then screams in excitement, signaling Sylvia to rush to find him. She sees the orange stuffed animal on the ceiling thinking it is Wander and panics to take him down. She thinks he is dead and commands the ship to self destruct. It responds with "no takesy backsies". She is sent into an escape pod sad and miserable thinking not to turn back but when she sees Wander in the window of the ship she quickly leaves the escape pod and hops on rocks and asteroids to get to the ship. When she crashes in, she tries to turn off the self-destruct but can't, so she runs to get Wander. She finds him with barely enough time and escapes while the ship is exploding. When they get into the new bubble of orbble juice, Wander says that Captain Tim is good and shows Sylvia some tricks. Eventually, Captain Tim attempts to consume Wander's heart and Sylvia, panicking, threw him outside the bubble. Wander and Sylvia compromise and agree to give him toLord Hater. On Lord Hater's ship,PeepersandWatchdogsare being terrorized by the vicious alien, but Hater has grown fond of him. At the end, Wander asks Sylvia if he can visit him sometime and she replies "Absolutely not." He makes a cameo appearance in "The Little Guy", "The Eye on the Skull Ship" and "The Bad Neighbors".

characters.name: Captain Tim's Crew
characters.description: Captain Tim's crewwas the crew of saidTim. They resided ontheir ship. They were eventually killed bya stray creaturewhen it managed to get aboard.WanderandSylviafound the ship and explored in search of survivors, however it was too late for them. The crew's corpses, suits, helmets and bones were later seen in various hallways and rooms. What was left of them was presumably destroyed when their ship was blown up. Although they were never seen in person, there skulls and corpses were, and Captain Tim was seen in a vlog recording. Given that the captain wore the same suit as one of the corpses (minus the helmet), and the skulls of the crew seen were all about the same, it appears that the crew was all one species (presumably Captain Tim's).

characters.name: Carol
characters.description: CarolGeneral informationSpecies:CentipedeGender:FemaleBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Night"Voiced by:Lauren Faust Carolis a centipede girl seen in "The Night". She follows her friends in order to go to a party, but she goes back a few times since she forgot about something. She looks like the other centipedes. She loves parties and is rather forgetful, since she forgot two things on her way for the party. She herself jokingly noticed by saying "Oh, Carol, I swear, you'd forget your own deadly, venom sac if it wasn't attached to your thorax."
characters.personality_section: She loves parties and is rather forgetful, since she forgot two things on her way for the party. She herself jokingly noticed by saying "Oh, Carol, I swear, you'd forget your own deadly, venom sac if it wasn't attached to your thorax."

characters.name: Cashier
characters.description: CashierGeneral informationSpecies:AlienGender:MaleOccupation:CashierBehind the ScenesFirst Appearance:"The Nice Guy"Last Appearance:"The Gift"Voiced by:Keith FergusonTheCashieris a character who first appeared in "The Nice Guy". He is the cashier ofBlarpee's, and is generally annoyed byWander's antics through the episode. The cashier has light blue skin with darker splotches of blue and reddish hair. He wears a white shirt with red stripes at the end of the sleeves. He has three eyes, antennae, and two-toed feet. He acts pretty apathetic and gets annoyed easily. He acts pretty apathetic and gets annoyed easily.
characters.personality_section: He acts pretty apathetic and gets annoyed easily.
